In accordance with the legislative plan of the National People's Congress and the requirements of the State Council, a draft personal income tax law that combines comprehensive and classified laws will be submitted to the National People's Congress for review this year. Some representatives and industry experts said that it would be appropriate to combine the 11 categories of income and establish a pre-tax deduction of "basic deduction + special deduction".

culturax_text: 【新华社北京11月21日电】为积极应对人口老龄化，按照党的十九大决策部署，近日，中共中央、国务院印发了《国家积极应对人口老龄化中长期规划》（以下简称《规划》）。《规划》近期至2022年，中期至2035年，远期展望至2050年，是到本世纪中叶我国积极应对人口老龄化的战略性、综合性、指导性文件。《规划》指出，人口老龄化是社会发展的重要趋势，是人类文明进步的体现，也是今后较长一段时期我国的基本国情。人口老龄化对经济运行全领域、社会建设各环节、社会文化多方面乃至国家综合实力和国际竞争力，都具有深远影响，挑战与机遇并存。《规划》强调，积极应对人口老龄化，是贯彻以人民为中心的发展思想的内在要求，是实现经济高质量发展的必要保障，是维护国家安全和社会和谐稳定的重要举措。要按照经济高质量发展的要求，坚持以供给侧结构性改革为主线，构建管长远的制度框架，制定见实效的重大政策，坚持积极应对、共建共享、量力适度、创新开放的基本原则，走出一条中国特色应对人口老龄化道路。《规划》明确了积极应对人口老龄化的战略目标，即积极应对人口老龄化的制度基础持续巩固，财富储备日益充沛，人力资本不断提升，科技支撑更加有力，产品和服务丰富优质，社会环境宜居友好，经济社会发展始终与人口老龄化进程相适应，顺利建成社会主义现代化强国，实现中华民族伟大复兴的中国梦。到2022年，我国积极应对人口老龄化的制度框架初步建立；到2035年，积极应对人口老龄化的制度安排更加科学有效；到本世纪中叶，与社会主义现代化强国相适应的应对人口老龄化制度安排成熟完备。《规划》从5个方面部署了应对人口老龄化的具体工作任务。一是夯实应对人口老龄化的社会财富储备。通过扩大总量、优化结构、提高效益，实现经济发展与人口老龄化相适应。通过完善国民收入分配体系，优化政府、企业、居民之间的分配格局，稳步增加养老财富储备。健全更加公平更可持续的社会保障制度，持续增进全体人民的福祉水平。二是改善人口老龄化背景下的劳动力有效供给。通过提高出生人口素质、提升新增劳动力质量、构建老有所学的终身学习体系，提高我国人力资源整体素质。推进人力资源开发利用，实现更高质量和更加充分就业，确保积极应对人口老龄化的人力资源总量足、素质高。三是打造高质量的为老服务和产品供给体系。积极推进健康中国建设，建立和完善包括健康教育、预防保健、疾病诊治、康复护理、长期照护、安宁疗护的综合、连续的老年健康服务体系。健全以居家为基础、社区为依托、机构充分发展、医养有机结合的多层次养老服务体系，多渠道、多领域扩大适老产品和服务供给，提升产品和服务质量。四是强化应对人口老龄化的科技创新能力。深入实施创新驱动发展战略，把技术创新作为积极应对人口老龄化的第一动力和战略支撑，全面提升国民经济产业体系智能化水平。提高老年服务科技化、信息化水平，加大老年健康科技支撑力度，加强老年辅助技术研发和应用。五是构建养老、孝老、敬老的社会环境。强化应对人口老龄化的法治环境，保障老年人合法权益。构建家庭支持体系，建设老年友好型社会，形成老年人、家庭、社会、政府共同参与的良好氛围。《规划》要求，坚持党对积极应对人口老龄化工作的领导，坚持党政主要负责人亲自抓、负总责，强化各级政府落实规划的主体责任，进一步完善组织协调机制。推进国际合作，推动与“一带一路”相关国家开展应对人口老龄化的政策对话和项目对接。选择有特点和代表性的区域进行应对人口老龄化工作综合创新试点。建立健全工作机制、实施监管和考核问责制度，强化对规划实施的监督，确保规划落实。
culturax_text_en: [Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, November 21] In order to actively respond to the aging of the population, in accordance with the decisions and arrangements of the 19th National Congress of the Communist Party of China, the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and the State Council recently issued the "National Mid- and Long-term Plan to Actively Respond to the Aging of the Population" (hereinafter referred to as the "Plan"). The "Plan" covers the short term to 2022, the mid-term to 2035, and the long-term outlook to 2050. It is a strategic, comprehensive and guiding document for my country to actively respond to population aging by the middle of this century. The "Plan" points out that population aging is an important trend in social development, a manifestation of the progress of human civilization, and also my country's basic national situation for a long period of time in the future. Population aging has a profound impact on all areas of economic operation, all aspects of social construction, social and cultural aspects, and even the country's comprehensive strength and international competitiveness. Challenges and opportunities coexist. The "Plan" emphasizes that actively responding to population aging is an inherent requirement for implementing people-centered development thinking, a necessary guarantee for achieving high-quality economic development, and an important measure for maintaining national security and social harmony and stability. In accordance with the requirements of high-quality economic development, we must adhere to the supply-side structural reform as the main line, build an institutional framework for long-term management, formulate major policies with practical results, adhere to the basic principles of active response, joint contribution and sharing, appropriate capacity, innovation and opening up, and find a path to deal with the aging population with Chinese characteristics. The "Plan" clarifies the strategic goals of actively responding to the aging of the population, that is, the institutional foundation for actively responding to the aging of the population will continue to be consolidated, wealth reserves will become increasingly abundant, human capital will continue to improve, scientific and technological support will be more powerful, products and services will be rich and high-quality, the social environment will be livable and friendly, economic and social development will always be in line with the aging of the population, and we will successfully build a modern and powerful socialist country and realize the Chinese dream of the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation. By 2022, our country’s institutional framework for actively responding to population aging will be initially established; by 2035, the institutional arrangements for actively responding to population aging will be more scientific and effective; by the middle of this century, the institutional arrangements for responding to population aging that are compatible with a modern and powerful socialist country will be mature and complete. The "Plan" deploys specific tasks to deal with population aging from five aspects. The first is to consolidate social wealth reserves to cope with the aging of the population. By expanding the total amount, optimizing the structure, and improving efficiency, economic development can be adapted to the aging population. By improving the national income distribution system and optimizing the distribution pattern among the government, enterprises, and residents, we can steadily increase pension wealth reserves. We will improve a fairer and more sustainable social security system and continue to improve the well-being of all people. The second is to improve the effective supply of labor in the context of population aging. Improve the overall quality of my country's human resources by improving the quality of the birth population, improving the quality of new labor force, and building a lifelong learning system where old people learn. Promote the development and utilization of human resources to achieve higher quality and fuller employment, and ensure that the total amount of human resources that actively respond to the aging of the population is sufficient and of high quality. The third is to create a high-quality service and product supply system for the elderly. Actively promote the construction of a healthy China and establish and improve a comprehensive and continuous elderly health service system including health education, preventive health care, disease diagnosis and treatment, rehabilitation care, long-term care, and hospice care. We will improve a multi-level elderly care service system that is based on home, community-based, fully developed institutions, and organically integrated with medical and nursing care. We will expand the supply of elderly-friendly products and services through multiple channels and fields, and improve the quality of products and services. The fourth is to strengthen scientific and technological innovation capabilities to cope with the aging of the population. Deeply implement the innovation-driven development strategy, regard technological innovation as the first driving force and strategic support for actively responding to the aging of the population, and comprehensively enhance the intelligence level of the national economic and industrial system. Improve the level of science and technology and informatization of services for the elderly, increase support for health science and technology for the elderly, and strengthen the research and development and application of assistive technologies for the elderly. The fifth is to build a social environment of caring for, filial piety and respecting the elderly. Strengthen the legal environment to deal with the aging of the population and protect the legitimate rights and interests of the elderly. Build a family support system, build an age-friendly society, and create a good atmosphere in which the elderly, families, society, and the government participate. The "Plan" requires that the party's leadership in actively responding to the aging of the population be upheld, that the main party and government leaders be personally responsible and take overall responsibility, strengthen the main responsibility of governments at all levels to implement the plan, and further improve the organization and coordination mechanism. Promote international cooperation and promote policy dialogue and project docking with countries related to the “Belt and Road” to deal with population aging. Select characteristic and representative regions to carry out comprehensive innovation pilot projects in response to population aging. Establish and improve working mechanisms, implement supervision and assessment accountability systems, strengthen supervision of plan implementation, and ensure plan implementation.

culturax_text: 据新华社电5月23日，国家主席习近平向印度总理莫迪致贺电，祝贺其领导全国民主联盟赢得印度第17届人民院选举。习近平在贺电中指出，中国和印度互为重要邻国，是当今世界两个最大的发展中国家和新兴经济体。在双方共同努力下，两国关系近年来呈现强有力发展势头。中印在推动世界多极化、经济全球化、维护多边主义等重大问题上保持着良好协调与合作。我高度重视中印关系发展，愿同你一道努力，把握好两国关系前进方向，增进政治互信，拓展务实合作，推动两国更加紧密的发展伙伴关系不断迈上新台阶。（《习近平向印度总理莫迪致贺电》由金羊网为您提供，转载请注明来源，未经书面授权许可，不得转载或镜像。版权联系电话：020-87133589，87133588）
culturax_text_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, on May 23, President Xi Jinping sent a congratulatory message to Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, congratulating him on leading the National Democratic Alliance to win the 17th Lok Sabha election in India. Xi Jinping pointed out in his congratulatory message that China and India are each other's important neighbors and the two largest developing countries and emerging economies in the world today. With the joint efforts of both sides, relations between the two countries have shown strong momentum of development in recent years. China and India maintain good coordination and cooperation on major issues such as promoting world multipolarity, economic globalization, and safeguarding multilateralism. I attach great importance to the development of China-India relations and am willing to work with you to grasp the direction of bilateral relations, enhance political mutual trust, expand practical cooperation, and push the closer development partnership between the two countries to new heights. ("Xi Jinping's congratulatory message to Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi" is provided by Jinyang.com. Please indicate the source when reprinting. No reproduction or mirroring is allowed without written authorization. Copyright contact number: 020-87133589, 87133588)

culturax_text: 5月28日，中国科学院第十九次院士大会、中国工程院第十四次院士大会在北京人民大会堂隆重开幕。中共中央总书记、国家主席、中央军委主席习近平出席会议并发表重要讲话。新华社记者鞠鹏摄新华社北京5月28日电（记者陈芳余晓洁）中国科学院第十九次院士大会、中国工程院第十四次院士大会28日上午在人民大会堂隆重开幕。中共中央总书记、国家主席、中央军委主席习近平出席会议并发表重要讲话。他强调，中国要强盛、要复兴，就一定要大力发展科学技术，努力成为世界主要科学中心和创新高地。形势逼人，挑战逼人，使命逼人。我国广大科技工作者要把握大势、抢占先机，直面问题、迎难而上，瞄准世界科技前沿，引领科技发展方向，肩负起历史赋予的重任，勇做新时代科技创新的排头兵，努力建设世界科技强国。中共中央政治局常委、国务院总理李克强，中共中央政治局常委、中央书记处书记王沪宁，中共中央政治局常委、国务院副总理韩正出席会议。习近平在讲话中首先表示，中国科学院第十九次院士大会、中国工程院第十四次院士大会是党的十九大后我国科技界召开的一次盛会。习近平代表党中央向大会的召开表示热烈的祝贺，向全国广大科技工作者致以诚挚的问候。习近平强调，党的十八大以来，我们总结我国科技事业发展实践，观察大势，谋划全局，深化改革，全面发力，坚持党对科技事业的领导、坚持建设世界科技强国的奋斗目标、坚持走中国特色自主创新道路、坚持以深化改革激发创新活力、坚持创新驱动实质是人才驱动、坚持融入全球科技创新网络，我国科技事业密集发力、加速跨越，实现了历史性、整体性、格局性重大变化，重大创新成果竞相涌现，一些前沿方向开始进入并行、领跑阶段，科技实力正处于从量的积累向质的飞跃、点的突破向系统能力提升的重要时期。习近平指出，进入21世纪以来，全球科技创新进入空前密集活跃的时期，新一轮科技革命和产业变革正在重构全球创新版图、重塑全球经济结构。科学技术从来没有像今天这样深刻影响着国家前途命运，从来没有像今天这样深刻影响着人民生活福祉。习近平强调，要充分认识创新是第一动力，提供高质量科技供给，着力支撑现代化经济体系建设。要以提高发展质量和效益为中心，以支撑供给侧结构性改革为主线，把提高供给体系质量作为主攻方向，推动经济发展质量变革、效率变革、动力变革，显著增强我国经济质量优势。要把握数字化、网络化、智能化融合发展的契机，以信息化、智能化为杠杆培育新动能，优先培育和大力发展一批战略性新兴产业集群，推进互联网、大数据、人工智能同实体经济深度融合，推动制造业产业模式和企业形态根本性转变，促进我国产业迈向全球价值链中高端。习近平指出，要矢志不移自主创新，坚定创新信心，着力增强自主创新能力。只有自信的国家和民族，才能在通往未来的道路上行稳致远。树高叶茂，系于根深。自力更生是中华民族自立于世界民族之林的奋斗基点，自主创新是我们攀登世界科技高峰的必由之路。我国广大科技工作者要有强烈的创新信心和决心，既不妄自菲薄，也不妄自尊大，勇于攻坚克难、追求卓越、赢得胜利，积极抢占科技竞争和未来发展制高点。要以关键共性技术、前沿引领技术、现代工程技术、颠覆性技术创新为突破口，敢于走前人没走过的路，努力实现关键核心技术自主可控，把创新主动权、发展主动权牢牢掌握在自己手中。要强化战略导向和目标引导，强化科技创新体系能力，加快构筑支撑高端引领的先发优势，加强对关系根本和全局的科学问题的研究部署，在关键领域、卡脖子的地方下大功夫，集合精锐力量，作出战略性安排，尽早取得突破。要把满足人民对美好生活的向往作为科技创新的落脚点，把惠民、利民、富民、改善民生作为科技创新的重要方向。习近平强调，要全面深化科技体制改革，提升创新体系效能，着力激发创新活力。创新决胜未来，改革关乎国运。科技领域是最需要不断改革的领域。科技体制改革要敢于啃硬骨头，敢于涉险滩、闯难关，破除一切制约科技创新的思想障碍和制度藩篱。要坚持科技创新和制度创新“双轮驱动”，以问题为导向，以需求为牵引，在实践载体、制度安排、政策保障、环境营造上下功夫，在创新主体、创新基础、创新资源、创新环境等方面持续用力，强化国家战略科技力量，提升国家创新体系整体效能。要优化和强化技术创新体系顶层设计，明确企业、高校、科研院所创新主体在创新链不同环节的功能定位，激发各类主体创新激情和活力。要加快转变政府科技管理职能，发挥好组织优势。要着力改革和创新科研经费使用和管理方式，改革科技评价制度，正确评价科技创新成果的科学价值、技术价值、经济价值、社会价值、文化价值，把人的创造性活动从不合理的经费管理、人才评价等体制中解放出来。习近平指出，要深度参与全球科技治理，贡献中国智慧，着力推动构建人类命运共同体。自主创新是开放环境下的创新，绝不能关起门来搞，而是要聚四海之气、借八方之力。（下转2版）
culturax_text_en: On May 28, the 19th Academician Conference of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and the 14th Academician Conference of the Chinese Academy of Engineering opened grandly at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. Xi Jinping, General Secretary of the CPC Central Committee, President of the State, and Chairman of the Central Military Commission, attended the meeting and delivered an important speech. Photo by Xinhua News Agency reporter Ju Peng Xi Jinping, General Secretary of the CPC Central Committee, President of the State, and Chairman of the Central Military Commission, attended the meeting and delivered an important speech. He emphasized that if China wants to be strong and rejuvenated, it must vigorously develop science and technology and strive to become the world's major science center and innovation highland. The situation is pressing, the challenges are pressing, and the mission is pressing. The vast number of scientific and technological workers in our country must seize the general trend, seize the opportunity, face the problems head-on, rise to the difficulties, aim at the forefront of world science and technology, lead the direction of scientific and technological development, shoulder the important responsibilities assigned by history, bravely be the vanguard of scientific and technological innovation in the new era, and strive to build a world scientific and technological power. Li Keqiang, member of the Standing Committee of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Premier of the State Council, Wang Huning, member of the Standing Committee of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Secretary of the Secretariat of the CPC Central Committee, and Han Zheng, member of the Standing Committee of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Vice Premier of the State Council, attended the meeting. In his speech, Xi Jinping first said that the 19th Academician Conference of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and the 14th Academician Conference of the Chinese Academy of Engineering are grand gatherings held by my country's scientific and technological circles after the 19th National Congress of the Communist Party of China. On behalf of the Party Central Committee, Xi Jinping expressed warm congratulations on the convening of the conference and extended sincere greetings to the vast number of scientific and technological workers across the country. Xi Jinping emphasized that since the 18th National Congress of the Communist Party of China, we have summarized the development practice of my country's science and technology undertakings, observed the general trend, planned the overall situation, deepened reforms, and made comprehensive efforts. We have adhered to the party's leadership of science and technology undertakings, adhered to the goal of building a world power in science and technology, adhered to the path of independent innovation with Chinese characteristics, persisted in deepening reforms to stimulate innovation vitality, and persisted in the innovation-driven essence of people. Driven by talents and insisting on integrating into the global scientific and technological innovation network, my country's scientific and technological undertakings have made intensive efforts and accelerated leaps, achieving historic, holistic, and patterned major changes. Major innovation results have emerged one after another, and some cutting-edge directions have begun to enter the parallel and leading stage. The scientific and technological strength is in an important period from quantitative accumulation to qualitative leap, from point breakthroughs to improvement of system capabilities. Xi Jinping pointed out that since the beginning of the 21st century, global scientific and technological innovation has entered a period of unprecedented intensity and activity. A new round of scientific and technological revolution and industrial transformation are reshaping the global innovation landscape and reshaping the global economic structure. Science and technology have never had such a profound impact on the future and destiny of the country, and have never had such a profound impact on people's lives and well-being as it does today. Xi Jinping emphasized that we must fully understand that innovation is the primary driving force, provide high-quality scientific and technological supplies, and strive to support the construction of a modern economic system. We must focus on improving the quality and efficiency of development, support supply-side structural reform as the main line, and improve the quality of the supply system as the main direction, promote changes in the quality, efficiency, and power of economic development, and significantly enhance my country's economic quality advantages. It is necessary to seize the opportunity of the integrated development of digitalization, networking, and intelligence, use informatization and intelligence as levers to cultivate new momentum, give priority to cultivating and vigorously developing a number of strategic emerging industry clusters, promote the deep integration of the Internet, big data, and artificial intelligence with the real economy, promote fundamental changes in the manufacturing industry model and enterprise form, and promote my country's industry to move towards the middle and high end of the global value chain. Xi Jinping pointed out that we must remain committed to independent innovation, strengthen our confidence in innovation, and strive to enhance our independent innovation capabilities. Only confident countries and nations can make steady progress on the road to the future. The trees are tall and leafy, tied to deep roots. Self-reliance is the starting point for the Chinese nation to stand on its own in the world, and independent innovation is the only way for us to scale the world's technological heights. The vast number of scientific and technological workers in our country must have strong confidence and determination to innovate, neither belittle themselves nor be arrogant, have the courage to overcome difficulties, pursue excellence, win, and actively seize the commanding heights of scientific and technological competition and future development. We must use key common technologies, cutting-edge leading technologies, modern engineering technologies, and disruptive technological innovations as breakthrough points, dare to take the road that has not been taken by our predecessors, strive to achieve independent control of key core technologies, and firmly hold the initiative in innovation and development in our own hands. It is necessary to strengthen strategic orientation and goal guidance, strengthen the capabilities of the scientific and technological innovation system, accelerate the construction of first-mover advantages that support high-end leadership, strengthen the research and deployment of scientific issues related to the fundamentals and the overall situation, work hard in key areas and choke points, gather elite forces, make strategic arrangements, and achieve breakthroughs as soon as possible. Satisfying the people's yearning for a better life must be regarded as the foothold of scientific and technological innovation, and benefiting, benefiting, enriching and improving people's livelihood must be regarded as an important direction of scientific and technological innovation. Xi Jinping

culturax_text: 8日，2018年度国家科学技术奖励大会在北京人民大会堂举行，刘永坦、钱七虎摘取我国科技界最高奖励。大会现场全体起立对两位最高奖获得者鼓掌、致敬；最高奖获得者在主席台就座并为其他奖项获得者颁奖……这是一个国家对科研工作者的最高礼赞，这是一个民族对科技追求的最佳注解！透视2018年度国家科技大奖，蜕变的种子不断孕育，创新的磅礴动能正在持续迸发。【磨“剑”砺“盾”】最高奖颁给大国重器铸造师一个为祖国海疆装上“千里眼”，一个潜心铸造“地下钢铁长城”。刘永坦和钱七虎，国之重器的两位“大工匠”，一同成为2018年度国家最高科学技术奖得主。“千里眼”是国之利剑——海波翻腾，寒风萧瑟，面对6000平方米大小的雷达天线阵，年过八旬的刘永坦神采奕奕。这是被称为“千里眼”+“火眼金睛”的新体制雷达，不仅“看”得更远，还能有效排除杂波干扰，发现超低空目标，对航天、航海、渔业等有着重要作用。为了这“不可或缺”，刘永坦曾面壁20余年。关键技术无处可寻，一度被认为是异想天开，但刘永坦始终坚信，路能靠自己走出来。一场从零起步的攻坚战，不仅破解了诸多瓶颈难题，更让我国成为世界上少数几个拥有该技术的国家之一。“地下长城”是国之坚盾——20世纪六七十年代，为加强防护工程的抗核打击能力，30多岁的钱七虎受命设计飞机洞库防护门。没有现成技术，他靠自学整理出十万多字外文资料，国内少数单位拥有大型计算机，他利用别人吃饭、睡觉时间“蹭”设备，最终解决了大型防护门在核爆后变形打不开等问题，设计出当时我国跨度最大、抗力最高的地下飞机洞库防护门。矛越强，盾愈坚。海湾战争后，钱七虎敏锐察觉到小型钻地核武器对深地下防护工程的威胁，率先开展抗钻地核爆防护的研究。几十年来，钱七虎带领团队为人员、武器穿上“防弹衣”，为首脑指挥中枢、战略武器安上了“金钟罩”。【“诺奖级成果“】基础研究连续第6年有公认突破量子反常霍尔效应，国际物理学界的前沿热点，许多科学家相信，相关研究将加速推进信息技术革命。它的国际首次实验发现，诞生在中国。论文当年在美国《科学》期刊发表后，被国际凝聚态物理学界公认为近年来最重要的发现之一。物理学大师杨振宁评价：这是从中国实验室里，第一次发表出了诺贝尔奖级的物理学论文。薛其坤院士领衔的清华大学和中科院物理所实验团队因此获得2018年度国家自然科学奖一等奖。这是继铁基超导、多光子纠缠、中微子振荡后，我国物理学再次取得的突破性进展。曾9度空缺的国家自然科学奖一等奖，到2018年度已连续6年产生获奖者。这一定程度上也意味着，我国基础研究近年来接连取得公认的重大进展。建设世界科技强国，必先提振基础研究。党的十八大以来，我国通过一系列改革，进一步加强对基础研究的持续稳定支持。从衡量基础研究的重要指标——国际科技论文来看，数量不断增长，多年稳居世界第二位。“我国基础研究总体处于从量的积累向质的飞跃、从点的突破向系统能力提升的重要阶段。”薛其坤说，但也要清醒地看到，与世界科技强国相比，我国基础研究和原始创新能力依旧存在明显差距，广大科技工作者还要再接再厉，接续奋斗。在他看来，日益强大的国力、良好完善的科技政策、科学系统的科技规划、催人奋进的创新氛围，是实验发现量子反常霍尔效应的基础和保障，“我们的成果与改革开放40年来取得的成就密不可分”。【聚焦关键技术】用创新支撑“强国梦”钢铁，工业的脊梁。长期以来，我国钢产量位居世界第一，但高速列车的耐磨轮轨、输送海底石油的无缝钢管等高品质特殊钢还依赖进口，一个重要原因是不掌握电磁搅拌系统的核心技术。罗安院士领衔的“湖南大学电能变换与控制创新团队”历经20多年攻关，成为该领域的世界排头兵，成果应用于武钢、宝钢等国内外160多家钢铁企业。他们获得科技进步奖创新团队的荣誉。地基，建筑之“根”。我国工程建设规模长期居世界首位，但国内大量分布着各种软弱地基，如何夯实基础，是工程建设中亟待解决的难题。自称“大半辈子跟泥巴打交道”的浙江大学龚晓南院士，近30年来不断突破传统地基处理技术瓶颈，成果在京津城际高铁、京沪高铁、浙江杭宁高速公路等许多重大工程中成功应用。他负责的“复合地基理论、关键技术及工程应用”项目获得科技进步奖一等奖。提高关键核心技术创新能力，越来越成为科技界的共识。关键核心技术要不来、买不来、讨不来。“只有把关键核心技术掌握在自己手中，才能从根本上保障国家经济安全、国防安全和其他安全。”罗安说，科技工作者要敢于走前人没走过的路，努力实现关键核心技术自主可控。【民生“可感度”高】科技要让生活更美好湖北荆州一块几百亩的地里种植了新品种高产黄瓜。凌晨三点多，大家头戴探照灯，正组织集体采收，辛劳中洋溢着欣喜。中国农业科学院研究员黄三文也加入采收队伍中。“真真切切感受到自己科技成果落地的欣慰，这也是我未来进一步研究的动力。”黄三文回忆当时的情景。科技从来没有像今天这样深刻影响着人民生活福祉。肺癌，癌症中的头号杀手，外科切除是根治早中期肺癌的关键。广州医科大学附属第一医院院长何建行通过技术革新，创建肺癌微创治疗体系，病人通常术后数小时就可下床，3天后可出院。科技创新将有效促进社会发展和民生改善，满足人民日益增长的美好生活需要。从生态环保到灾害防治，从农业育种到卫生健康，2018年度科学技术奖获奖项目中，面向改善民生和生态环境建设的科技创新成果涌现，是对“科技让生活更美好”最充分的诠释。“这些年来，我国科技体制发生了翻天覆地的变化，科研条件有了极大改善，与民生息息相关的科技工作者也开始陆续挑战国际高度。”高俊平说，未来要进一步把满足人民对美好生活的向往作为科技创新的落脚点，把惠民、利民、富民、改善民生作为科技创新的重要方向。【企业纷纷亮相】创新主体地位还要不断强化澜沧江上汽笛响，各国商船来往忙。华能澜沧江水电股份有限公司高级顾问马洪琪院士带领团队，研发出具有自主知识产权的世界上首座水力式升船机，打通了澜沧江—湄公河水运主通道，为境内外船舶提供便捷快速的服务。“中国发明的水力式升船机，从原理上突破了传统升船机的技术瓶颈，更具技术优势，是升船机历
culturax_text_en: On the 8th, the 2018 National Science and Technology Awards Conference was held at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. Liu Yongtan and Qian Qihu won the highest awards in my country's science and technology community. Everyone at the conference stood up to applaud and pay tribute to the two top prize winners; the top prize winner took his seat on the rostrum and presented awards to other prize winners... This is a country's highest praise for scientific researchers, and it is the best annotation of a nation's pursuit of science and technology! Looking at the 2018 National Science and Technology Awards, the seeds of transformation are constantly being nurtured, and the majestic momentum of innovation is continuing to burst out. [Sharpening the "Sword" and Sharpening the "Shield"] The highest award is awarded to the heavy weapon casters of the great powers, one who has provided "clairvoyance" for the motherland's borders, and the other who has devoted himself to casting the "Underground Steel Great Wall". Liu Yongtan and Qian Qihu, two "great craftsmen" who are important to the country, became the winners of the 2018 National Highest Science and Technology Award. "Clairvoyance" is the sword of the country - the sea waves are rolling, the cold wind is blowing, and facing a 6,000-square-meter radar antenna array, Liu Yongtan, who is over eighty years old, is full of energy. This is a new system radar called "clairvoyance" + "fiery eye". It not only "sees" further, but can also effectively eliminate clutter interference and discover ultra-low-altitude targets. It plays an important role in aerospace, navigation, fishery, etc. For this "indispensable", Liu Yongtan has faced the wall for more than 20 years. The key technology was nowhere to be found and was once considered fanciful, but Liu Yongtan always believed that the road could be found on his own. A tough battle starting from scratch not only solved many bottlenecks, but also made our country one of the few countries in the world that possesses this technology. The "Underground Great Wall" is the country's strong shield - in the 1960s and 1970s, in order to strengthen the anti-nuclear strike capability of the protection project, Qian Qihu, who was in his 30s, was ordered to design the protective door of the aircraft cavern. There was no ready-made technology, so he relied on self-study to compile more than 100,000 words of foreign language materials. A few domestic units had large computers. He used other people's time to "use" the equipment while eating and sleeping, and finally solved the problem of large protective doors being deformed and unable to open after a nuclear explosion. He designed the underground aircraft cave protective door with the largest span and the highest resistance in my country at that time. The stronger the spear, the stronger the shield. After the Gulf War, Qian Qihu was keenly aware of the threat of small earth-penetrating nuclear weapons to deep underground protection projects, and took the lead in conducting research on anti-earth-penetrating nuclear explosion protection. For decades, Qian Qihu has led his team to put on "bulletproof vests" for personnel and weapons, and installed a "golden bell" for the leader's command center and strategic weapons. ["Nobel Prize-level results"] Basic research has recognized breakthroughs in the quantum anomalous Hall effect for the sixth consecutive year. It is a cutting-edge hot spot in the international physics community. Many scientists believe that related research will accelerate the information technology revolution. Its first international experimental discovery was born in China. After the paper was published in the American journal Science that year, it was recognized by the international condensed matter physics community as one of the most important discoveries in recent years. Physics master Yang Zhenning commented: This is the first time a Nobel Prize-level physics paper has been published from a Chinese laboratory. The experimental team of Tsinghua University and the Institute of Physics, Chinese Academy of Sciences, led by Academician Xue Qikun, won the first prize of the 2018 National Natural Science Award. This is another breakthrough in my country's physics following iron-based superconductivity, multi-photon entanglement, and neutrino oscillation. The first prize of the National Natural Science Award, which has been vacant for nine times, has had winners for six consecutive years in 2018. To a certain extent, this also means that my country’s basic research has successively made recognized and significant progress in recent years. To build a world power in science and technology, we must first boost basic research. Since the 18th National Congress of the Communist Party of my country, our country has further strengthened its sustained and stable support for basic research through a series of reforms. Judging from international scientific papers, an important indicator for measuring basic research, the number has been growing continuously and has ranked second in the world for many years. "Our country's basic research is generally at an important stage from quantitative accumulation to qualitative leap, from point breakthrough to systematic capability improvement." Xue Qikun said, but we must also clearly see that compared with the world's scientific and technological powers, there is still a clear gap in my country's basic research and original innovation capabilities, and the majority of scientific and technological workers must continue to work hard and continue to struggle. In his view, increasingly powerful national strength, sound science and technology policies, scientific and systematic science and technology planning, and an inspiring innovation atmosphere are the foundation and guarantee for the experimental discovery of the quantum anomalous Hall effect. "Our results are inseparable from the achievements made in the past 40 years of reform and opening up." [Focus on key technologies] Use innovation to support the "dream of a strong country" Steel, the backbone of industry. For a long time, my country's steel production has ranked first in the world, but high-quality special steel such as wear-resistant wheel rails for high-speed trains and seamless steel pipes for transporting seabed oil has still relied on imports. An important reason is that it does not master the core technology of electromagnetic stirring systems. After more than 20 years of research and development, the "Hunan University Electric Energy Conversion and Control Innovation Team" led by Academician Luo An has become

culturax_text: 据新华社北京10月26日电经李克强总理签批，国务院日前印发关于促进快递业发展的若干意见（以下简称意见）。这是国务院出台的第一部全面指导快递业发展的纲领性文件，提出了促进快递业发展的总体要求、重点任务和政策措施。意见要求，坚持市场主导、安全为基、创新驱动、协同发展的原则，以解决制约快递业发展的突出问题为导向，以“互联网＋”快递为发展方向，培育壮大市场主体，融入并衔接综合交通体系，扩展服务网络惠及范围，保障寄递渠道安全，促进行业转型升级和提质增效，不断满足人民群众日益增长的寄递需求，更好服务于国民经济和社会发展。意见提出，到2020年，快递市场规模稳居世界首位，基本实现乡乡有网点、村村通快递，快递年业务量达到500亿件，年业务收入达到8000亿元；建设一批辐射国内外的航空快递货运枢纽，形成具有国际竞争力的大型骨干快递企业；国内重点城市间实现48小时送达，国际快递服务通达范围更广、速度更快，服务满意度稳步提高；年均新增就业岗位约20万个，全年支撑网络零售交易额突破10万亿元，日均服务用户2.7亿人次以上，基本建成普惠城乡、技术先进、服务优质、安全高效、绿色节能的快递服务体系，形成覆盖全国、联通国际的服务网络。意见围绕培育壮大快递企业、推进“互联网＋”快递、构建完善服务网络、衔接综合交通体系、加强行业安全监管等五项重点任务，从深入推进简政放权、优化快递市场环境、健全法规规划体系、加大政策支持力度、改进快递车辆管理、建设专业人才队伍等六个方面提出了34项政策措施。
culturax_text_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, October 26, with the signature and approval of Premier Li Keqiang, the State Council recently issued several opinions on promoting the development of the express delivery industry (hereinafter referred to as the opinions). This is the first programmatic document issued by the State Council to comprehensively guide the development of the express delivery industry. It puts forward the overall requirements, key tasks and policy measures to promote the development of the express delivery industry. The opinions require that the principles of market-led, safety-based, innovation-driven and coordinated development should be adhered to, with the orientation of solving outstanding problems restricting the development of the express delivery industry, and "Internet +" express delivery as the development direction, cultivating and strengthening market entities, integrating and connecting the comprehensive transportation system, expanding the scope of benefit of the service network, ensuring the safety of delivery channels, promoting industry transformation and upgrading and improving quality and efficiency, continuously meeting the people's growing delivery needs, and better serving the national economy and social development. The opinion proposes that by 2020, the express delivery market will firmly rank first in the world, basically realize that there are outlets in every township and express delivery is available in every village, the annual express business volume will reach 50 billion pieces, and the annual business revenue will reach 800 billion yuan; a number of air express freight hubs radiating at home and abroad will be built to form a large-scale backbone express delivery enterprise with international competitiveness; 48-hour delivery will be achieved between key domestic cities, and international express delivery will be achieved. Delivery services are more accessible and faster, and service satisfaction is steadily increasing; an average of about 200,000 new jobs are created every year, supporting online retail transaction volume exceeding 10 trillion yuan throughout the year, and serving more than 270 million daily average users. An express service system that benefits both urban and rural areas, is technologically advanced, has high-quality services, is safe, efficient, and is green and energy-saving has been basically established, forming a service network that covers the country and connects the world. Focusing on the five key tasks of cultivating and expanding express delivery companies, promoting "Internet +" express delivery, building and improving service networks, connecting comprehensive transportation systems, and strengthening industry safety supervision, the opinions put forward 34 policy measures from six aspects, including further promoting streamlined administration and delegating power, optimizing the express delivery market environment, improving the regulatory planning system, increasing policy support, improving express delivery vehicle management, and building a professional talent team.

culturax_text: 新华社北京12月22日电12月22日，中共中央总书记、国家主席习近平应约同老挝人民革命党中央总书记、国家主席本扬通电话。习近平表示，我很高兴今年再次同本扬总书记同志通电话。在老挝党中央和本扬总书记同志坚强领导下，老挝政治社会稳定，经济持续发展，民生显著改善。近年来，我和本扬总书记同志积极推动中老命运共同体建设，开启了中老关系新时代。我们高度重视扶贫工作，使扶贫合作成为中老关系一大亮点。双方携手开展抗疫、抗洪斗争，共同反对将疫情政治化、借疫情搞污名化，生动诠释了患难与共、守望相助的命运共同体精神。本扬总书记同志为发展中老友好倾注了大量心血，我也同本扬总书记同志结下密切工作关系和深厚友谊。习近平说，明年中国共产党将迎来建党100周年，开启全面建设社会主义现代化国家新征程。老挝党将举行十一大，步入国家建设和社会主义发展新阶段。我们愿同老方一道，为新时代两党两国关系开新局、谱新篇。双方要深化战略沟通，在涉及彼此核心利益问题上相互坚定支持。双方应密切高层交往，深化治党治国理论和经验交流，不断完善全方位、宽领域、多层次的两党交往格局。（下转第二版）
culturax_text_en: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, December 22. On December 22, General Secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and President Xi Jinping had a telephone conversation with General Secretary of the Central Committee of the Lao People’s Revolutionary Party and President Bounnhang Vorachit on request. Xi Jinping said, I am very happy to have a phone call with General Secretary Bounnhang again this year. Under the strong leadership of the Lao Party Central Committee and General Secretary Bounnhang, Laos has achieved political and social stability, sustained economic development, and significant improvement in people's livelihood. In recent years, General Secretary Bounnhang and I have actively promoted the construction of a community with a shared future between China and Laos and opened a new era of China-Laos relations. We attach great importance to poverty alleviation work and make poverty alleviation cooperation a highlight of China-Laos relations. The two sides joined hands to fight against the epidemic and floods, and jointly opposed politicizing the epidemic and using the epidemic to stigmatize, vividly interpreting the spirit of a community with a shared future of sharing weal and woe and helping each other. Comrade General Secretary Bounnhang has devoted a lot of effort to the development of China-Laos friendship, and I have also forged a close working relationship and profound friendship with Comrade General Secretary Bounnhang. Xi Jinping said that next year the Communist Party of China will celebrate the 100th anniversary of its founding and embark on a new journey of comprehensively building a modern socialist country. The Lao Party will hold its 11th National Congress and enter a new stage of national construction and socialist development. We are willing to work with Laos to open a new chapter for the relations between the two parties and the two countries in the new era. Both sides should deepen strategic communication and firmly support each other on issues involving each other's core interests. The two sides should intensify high-level exchanges, deepen exchanges of theories and experiences in party and state governance, and continuously improve the all-round, wide-ranging, and multi-level exchange pattern between the two parties. (Reprinted from the second edition)

culturax_text: 据新华社北京10月11日电（记者杨依军）外交部发言人洪磊11日在例行记者会上驳斥了日本外相玄叶光一郎有关中方对钓鱼岛主权主张不成立的说法，称其用断章取义的材料试图支撑日方在钓鱼岛问题上的立场“完全是强盗逻辑”。有记者问，玄叶光一郎10日在记者会上说，中方在上世纪70年代前从未提出过对钓鱼岛的主权主张，1895年日方调查确认钓鱼岛不属于中国后编入日本领土，日方以1920年中国驻长崎领事所发信以及1933年、1960年中国发行的地图等为依据，认为中方对钓鱼岛的主权主张不成立。中方对此有何评论？洪磊说，玄叶外相已不是第一次拿出断章取义的材料来试图支撑日方的立场。在涉及国家领土主权如此重大严肃的问题上，用一些支离破碎的材料来佐证自己的立场，只能证明日本从未合法拥有过对钓鱼岛的主权。他说，关于日本利用甲午战争窃取钓鱼岛的历史经纬，中日两国学者都作过详实严谨的论述，日本自己的官方史料也可以构成明白无误的旁证，“日方对此视而不见、避而不提，反而为日本在历史上通过战争手段进行侵略扩张张目，这完全是强盗逻辑”。
culturax_text_en: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, October 11 (Reporter Yang Yijun) Foreign Ministry spokesperson Hong Lei refuted Japanese Foreign Minister Koichiro Genba's statement that China's claim to sovereignty over the Diaoyu Islands is not valid at a regular press conference on the 11th, saying that using materials taken out of context to try to support Japan's position on the Diaoyu Islands issue is "completely bandit logic." A reporter asked Genba Koichiro at a press conference on the 10th that China had never made a claim to sovereignty over the Diaoyu Islands before the 1970s. In 1895, Japan confirmed that the Diaoyu Islands did not belong to China and were incorporated into Japanese territory. Based on a letter from the Chinese Consulate in Nagasaki in 1920 and maps issued by China in 1933 and 1960, Japan believed that China’s sovereignty claim over the Diaoyu Islands was not tenable. What is China’s comment on this? Hong Lei said that this is not the first time that Foreign Minister Xuan Ye has taken out of context materials to try to support Japan's position. On such a major and serious issue involving national territorial sovereignty, using some fragmentary materials to support its position can only prove that Japan has never legally possessed sovereignty over the Diaoyu Islands. He said that regarding the historical merits of Japan's use of the Sino-Japanese War to steal the Diaoyu Islands, Chinese and Japanese scholars have made detailed and rigorous discussions, and Japan's own official historical materials can also constitute unmistakable circumstantial evidence. "The Japanese side turned a blind eye to this and avoided mentioning it. Instead, it justified Japan's aggression and expansion through war in history. This is completely bandit logic."

culturax_text: □日本首相安倍晋三当地时间22日参加达沃斯论坛年会□晨报记者程艳综合报道当地时间1月22日，2014年达沃斯世界经济论坛揭幕，日本首相安倍晋三出席开幕式并发表主旨演讲。他公然煽动世界对抗中国，大放厥词，再次为自己参拜靖国神社辩护。中国外交部发言人秦刚23日在例行记者会上对安倍的言论进行了回应——整个近现代史上日本对中国都干了些什么？日本极力扩充军备真实的目的到底是什么？安倍参拜靖国神社，到底想干什么？秦刚用一连串质问，对安倍的言论进行了驳斥。安倍：日中关系像一战爆发前的英德关系中方：安倍不如检讨日本对中国干了什么22日在达沃斯发表演讲前，安倍与参会记者进行了对话，他宣称，现在的日中关系就像第一次世界大战爆发前夕的英德关系。“日本和中国是相互依靠的经济体、贸易伙伴，有巨大的共同利益，就像1914年的英国和德国。”当时英德虽然贸易往来密切，但还是发生了战争，“日中需要引以为鉴”。对于这一类比，秦刚回应说，日本领导人对历史的记忆不能错位。与其拿一战前的英德关系说事儿，不如直面历史，深刻检讨一战前乃至整个近现代史上日本对中国都干了些什么！必须引以为鉴的是日本军国主义对外侵略和殖民统治历史，必须牢记的是日本法西斯战争给包括中国在内的受害国人民带来的深重灾难。只有真正做到正视历史、以史为鉴，日本同亚洲邻国的关系才有未来，日本才能让亚洲人民和世界人民放心。秦刚又补充说，安倍之所以这么说，完全就是为了逃避侵略历史，移花接木，偷换概念。与其拿一战前英德关系说事儿，不如深刻地检讨甲午战争，检讨日本对朝鲜半岛的殖民统治，检讨日本二战对受害国人民发动的法西斯战争。这不都是现成的直接的教材吗？为什么还要舍近求远，拿什么英德关系说事儿呢？安倍在达沃斯论坛上还声称，日中两国应先举行坦诚对话，不应因存在问题而拒绝对话或预设前提。秦刚对此回应说，关于中日领导人之间对话，我们已多次明确表明了立场。日方不能幻想一方面拒不承认错误，到处说中国的坏话，另一方面又空喊对话口号。这样的对话不会有任何效果。中国领导人很忙，我们还是让他们有更多时间来做有用、有效的事情。日本领导人以自己的行动关闭了中日领导人对话的大门。他现在要做的是承认错误、改弦易辙，以实际行动为中日关系改善创造有利条件。安倍：中国国防预算增长是一种“挑衅”中方：安倍该解释为什么企图修改宪法安倍在与记者对话时还声称，中国国防预算增长是一种“挑衅”，是太平洋地区不稳定的一个主要因素。英国广播公司（BBC）记者提问称，既然希望中日和平又担忧意外冲突，是否有缓解中日紧张关系的计划或者路线图？安倍很快回答：“中国正在加强军备建设，这不可能发生。”作为首位在达沃斯世界经济论坛开幕式上发表主旨演讲的日本首相，安倍在当晚的演说中抓紧机会进行自我推销，大谈“安倍经济学”，声称其推行的经济改革政策即将“开花结果”，日本经济从持续20多年的通货紧缩中松绑。然而，醉翁之意不在酒。从日本经济恢复谈到亚洲成为拉动世界经济增长的引擎后，安倍突然话锋一转，提出亚洲经济增长的红利不能被浪费在军备扩张上，“我们必须抑制亚洲无止境的军备扩张，倘若亚洲的和平与稳定遭到动摇，将给全世界带来可怕的连锁反应”。安倍不点名地指责中国说，军事开支预算必须完全透明，应该以可核实的方式进行公开披露，他还呼吁通过“对话和法治”，而不是“武力和胁迫”解决国家间纷争。法新社指出，虽然安倍没有明确提及中国，但在场观众都很清楚，这是日本向中国发出的一个警报信号，“安倍在鼓动全世界站起来对抗日益自信的中国，从而拉拢他国在中日领土纠纷中站到日本的一边”。秦刚对此回应称，其实中国在历史上早就是一个大国。汉唐时代中国就已经是一个世界大国。所以不存在所谓中国要崛起成为一个世界大国的问题。我们现在致力的是实现中华民族的伟大复兴。在这个过程中，我们坚持走和平发展、合作共赢的道路。即使中国今后发展强大，即使中华民族伟大复兴的目标实现了，我们仍将坚定地走这样一条道路。中国坚持走和平发展的道路，奉行防御性的国防政策。中国军事意图和政策是公开的、透明的，我们在国防白皮书中和其他场合都作了正式宣布。现在应该增加透明度的恰恰是日本。日本领导人应该向亚洲国家、向国际社会解释为什么企图修改和平宪法，为什么极力扩充军备。他真实的目的到底是什么？安倍：参拜靖国神社无意伤害中韩感情中方：安倍想要推动日本摆脱战后体制在演讲结束后，安倍被参会人员问及对于因参拜靖国神社而使日本与中韩两国交恶一事有何看法，安倍狡辩称，外界对他参拜靖国神社一事“有非常重大的误解”。安倍声称，参拜靖国神社是一件“自然而然”的事，靖国神社中供奉了在明治维新、一战和二战中的死者。他在向为国捐躯的人表达敬意，无意伤害中韩两国人民的感情，“我只是想向逝去的人、向为国捐躯的人双手合十表示感谢。我认为，这种姿态是世界各国领导人都会采取的行动。”安倍称，正因为有各种各样的误解，“所以想敞开胸襟展开（与中国和韩国的）首脑对话”。对于安倍此番言论，秦刚在23日的外交部记者会上回应称，靖国神社是日本军国主义对外发动侵略战争的精神工具和象征，供奉着二战甲级战犯，他们是东方的纳粹。安倍首相参拜靖国神社，到底想干什么？我们可以翻阅一下他曾经公开宣称的话。他多次称，甲级战犯在日本国内不是罪犯，战后远东国际军事法庭对甲级战犯的审判是战胜国对战败国的单方面定罪。他对上次担任首相期间没有参拜感到“痛恨之极”。他要推动日本摆脱战后体制。这才是他的真心话。秦刚表示，日本对外侵略和殖民统治给包括中韩在内的亚洲邻国带来深重灾难。换位思考，如果日本领导人站在南京大屠杀遇难者后代的角度、站在日本强征的“慰安妇”和劳工受害者家属的角度、站在日本“731部队”活体细菌试验牺牲者后代的角度，他还会去参拜靖国神社吗？他还能发表上述言论吗？他还能说出参拜靖国神社无意伤害中韩两国人民感情的话吗？日本领导人参拜靖国神社的实质，是要否认和美化日本军国主义对外侵略和殖民统治历史，挑战二战结果和战后国际秩序。我们注意到，包括日本自民党、联合执政党、前首相在内的日本政要以及各界有
culturax_text_en: □Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe attended the Davos Forum Annual Meeting on the 22nd local time □Morning News reporter Cheng Yan comprehensive report On January 22nd, local time, the 2014 Davos World Economic Forum was unveiled. Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe attended the opening ceremony and delivered a keynote speech. He openly incited the world to fight against China, spoke nonsense, and once again defended his visit to the Yasukuni Shrine. Chinese Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Qin Gang responded to Abe's remarks at a regular press conference on the 23rd - What has Japan done to China throughout modern and modern history? What is Japan's real purpose in expanding its armaments? What does Abe want to do when he visits Yasukuni Shrine? Qin Gang refuted Abe's remarks with a series of questions. Abe: Japan-China relations are like the Anglo-German relations before the outbreak of World War I. China: Abe would rather review what Japan did to China before delivering a speech in Davos on the 22nd. Before delivering a speech in Davos on the 22nd, Abe had a dialogue with participating reporters. He declared that the current Japan-China relations are like the Anglo-German relations on the eve of the outbreak of World War I. "Japan and China are interdependent economies and trading partners with huge common interests, just like Britain and Germany in 1914." Although Britain and Germany had close trade exchanges at that time, war still broke out. "Japan and China need to learn from this." Regarding this analogy, Qin Gang responded that Japanese leaders’ memory of history cannot be misplaced. Rather than focusing on the Anglo-German relationship before World War I, it is better to face history and deeply examine what Japan did to China before World War I and throughout modern history! What we must learn from is the history of Japanese militarism's foreign aggression and colonial rule, and what we must bear in mind is the profound disaster that Japan's fascist war brought to the people of the victimized countries, including China. Only by truly facing up to history and drawing lessons from history can Japan's relations with its Asian neighbors have a future, and can Japan reassure the people of Asia and the world. Qin Gang added that the reason why Abe said this was simply to escape from the history of aggression, to copy the past, and to secretly change the concept. Rather than focusing on the Anglo-German relationship before World War I, it is better to deeply review the Sino-Japanese War of 1884-1894, Japan’s colonial rule of the Korean Peninsula, and Japan’s fascist war against the people of the victimized countries in World War II. Aren’t these all ready-made and direct teaching materials? Why should we sacrifice the near and seek the far away? Why should the Anglo-German relationship be used as an excuse? Abe also claimed at the Davos Forum that Japan and China should hold candid dialogue first and should not refuse dialogue or set preconditions because of existing problems. Qin Gang responded by saying that regarding the dialogue between Chinese and Japanese leaders, we have clearly stated our position many times. The Japanese side cannot imagine that on the one hand, it refuses to admit its mistakes and speaks ill of China everywhere, while on the other hand, it just shouts the slogan of dialogue. Such conversations will have no effect. Chinese leaders are very busy, so we should give them more time to do useful and effective things. The Japanese leader has closed the door to dialogue between the leaders of China and Japan with his own actions. What he has to do now is to admit his mistakes, change course, and take practical actions to create favorable conditions for the improvement of Sino-Japanese relations. Abe: The increase in China's defense budget is a "provocation" China: Abe should explain why he is trying to amend the constitution. When talking to reporters, Abe also claimed that the increase in China's defense budget is a "provocation" and a major factor in instability in the Pacific region. A reporter from the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) asked: Since we hope for peace between China and Japan but are worried about unexpected conflicts, is there a plan or road map to ease tensions between China and Japan? Abe quickly replied: "China is strengthening its military build-up. This can't happen." As the first Japanese Prime Minister to deliver a keynote speech at the opening ceremony of the World Economic Forum in Davos, Abe seized the opportunity to promote himself in his speech that night, talking about "Abenomics" and claiming that the economic reform policies he implemented were about to "bear fruit" and the Japanese economy would be relieved from deflation that had lasted for more than 20 years. However, the drunkard's intention is not wine. After talking about Asia becoming the engine of world economic growth from the recovery of Japan's economy, Abe suddenly changed his subject and proposed that the dividends of Asia's economic growth cannot be wasted on arms expansion. "We must curb Asia's endless arms expansion. If Asia's peace and stability are shaken, it will bring terrible chain reactions to the world." Without naming China, Abe said military spending budgets must be completely transparent and should be publicly disclosed in a verifiable manner. He also called for resolving disputes between countries through "dialogue and the rule of law" rather than "force and coercion." Agence France-Presse pointed out that although Abe did not mention China explicitly, the audience present knew that this was an alarm signal sent by Japan to China. "Abe is encouraging the world to stand up against an increasingly confident China, thereby wooing other countries to side with Japan in the Sino-Japanese territorial disputes." Qin Gang responded by saying that in fact, China has long been a

culturax_text: 据新华社报道中国外交部发言人洪磊2月1日就所谓中方将马上划设“南海防空识别区”答记者问时说，总体看，中方并未感受到来自东盟国家的空中安全威胁，对与南海周边国家的关系和南海地区总体形势感到乐观。有记者问，日本《朝日新闻》报道，中国正计划在南海划设防空识别区。1月31日，美国国务院副发言人应询就此做了表态。中方对此有何评论？洪磊说，中国作为主权国家完全有权根据自身面临的空中安全形势，采取包括划设防空识别区在内的任何措施，维护国家安全，任何人都不能说三道四。他说：“我还要强调的是，中国与东盟关系发展前景光明，中国同东盟国家正共同致力于全面有效落实《南海各方行为宣言》，维护南海和地区和平稳定。总体看，中方并未感受到来自东盟国家的空中安全威胁，对与南海周边国家的关系和南海地区总体形势感到乐观。”洪磊表示，在此情况下，日本右翼势力近来再三炒作所谓中方马上就要在南海划设防空识别区，纯粹是试图转移国际视线，以掩盖自身修宪扩军的图谋，实属居心叵测。“我们正告这些势力，不要为了一己之私谣言惑众，渲染紧张。也希望有关方面谨言慎行，保持冷静、客观态度，与中方相向而行，为地区和平稳定和海空安全作出实实在在的贡献。”洪磊说。
culturax_text_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Hong Lei responded to a reporter's question on February 1 regarding the so-called "South China Sea Air Defense Identification Zone" that China will soon establish. Overall, China has not felt any air security threats from ASEAN countries and is optimistic about its relations with neighboring countries in the South China Sea and the overall situation in the South China Sea region. A reporter asked: Japan's "Asahi Shimbun" reported that China is planning to establish an air defense identification zone in the South China Sea. On January 31, the deputy spokesperson of the US State Department made a statement in response to inquiries. What is China’s comment on this? Hong Lei said that as a sovereign country, China has every right to take any measures, including setting up an air defense identification zone, to safeguard national security based on the air security situation it faces. No one can make irresponsible remarks. He said: "I would also like to emphasize that China-ASEAN relations have a bright future. China and ASEAN countries are working together to fully and effectively implement the Declaration on the Conduct of Parties in the South China Sea and maintain peace and stability in the South China Sea and the region. Overall, China has not felt any air security threats from ASEAN countries. "We are optimistic about relations with neighboring countries and the overall situation in the South China Sea," Hong Lei said. Under this situation, Japan's right-wing forces have repeatedly hyped that China will soon establish an air defense identification zone in the South China Sea. They are purely trying to divert international attention to cover up their own plans to amend the constitution and expand the military. They have ulterior motives. "We are telling these forces not to confuse the public with rumors and exaggerate tension for their own selfish purposes. We also hope that relevant parties will be cautious in their words and deeds, maintain a calm and objective attitude, work with China halfway, and make tangible contributions to regional peace, stability, and maritime and air security." Hong Lei said.

culturax_text: 新华社北京12月14日电外交部发言人洪磊14日表示，中韩双方将于12月22日在韩国首尔举行中韩海域划界首轮会谈。洪磊是在当日例行记者会上回答相关提问时作出上述表示的。洪磊说，2014年7月，习近平主席访韩期间，两国发表联合声明，宣布2015年启动海域划界谈判。为落实两国领导人共识，双方商定于今年12月22日在韩国首尔举行中韩海域划界首轮会谈。中韩海域划界政府谈判代表团中方团长、外交部副部长刘振民将率团赴韩，与韩外交部第二次官赵兑烈举行会谈。他说，中韩两国通过谈判协商公平合理解决海域划界问题，对于保障两国间海域的安宁和稳定、巩固和发展两国友好合作关系具有重要意义。这也充分体现出中方所一贯坚持的与直接当事国在尊重历史事实的基础上，根据国际法，通过谈判协商解决有关争议的立场和主张。希望中韩通过友好协商公平合理解决海洋权益主张重叠问题，为地区国家解决类似问题树立良好典范。
culturax_text_en: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, December 14th: Foreign Ministry spokesperson Hong Lei stated on the 14th that China and South Korea will hold the first round of China-South Korea maritime delimitation talks in Seoul, South Korea, on December 22. Hong Lei made the above remarks when answering relevant questions at the regular press conference that day. Hong Lei said that in July 2014, during President Xi Jinping’s visit to South Korea, the two countries issued a joint statement announcing the launch of maritime delimitation negotiations in 2015. In order to implement the consensus reached by the leaders of the two countries, the two sides agreed to hold the first round of talks on maritime delimitation between China and South Korea in Seoul, South Korea, on December 22 this year. Liu Zhenmin, the Chinese leader of the China-ROK maritime demarcation government negotiation delegation and Vice Minister of Foreign Affairs, will lead the delegation to South Korea and hold talks with Cho Dui-yeol, the second official of the South Korean Ministry of Foreign Affairs. He said that fair and reasonable settlement of maritime delimitation issues between China and South Korea through negotiation and consultation is of great significance to ensuring the tranquility and stability of the maritime areas between the two countries and consolidating and developing the friendly cooperative relations between the two countries. This also fully reflects China's consistent position and proposition of resolving relevant disputes through negotiation and consultation with the countries directly concerned on the basis of respecting historical facts and in accordance with international law. It is hoped that China and South Korea will resolve the issue of overlapping maritime rights claims in a fair and reasonable manner through friendly consultations and set a good example for regional countries to resolve similar issues.

culturax_text: 据新华社电俄罗斯联邦新一届总统普京7日在克里姆林宫宣誓就职，开始其第四个总统任期。当天中午，普京面对俄罗斯宪法宣读了总统誓词。随后，俄宪法法院院长佐尔金将象征总统权力的徽章授予普京，宣布普京正式就任俄罗斯总统。就职仪式后，在俄国防部长绍伊古见证下，普京接管了象征俄战略核力量的“核手提箱”。俄罗斯宪法规定，总统为俄罗斯国家元首兼武装力量最高统帅。当日，俄罗斯克里姆林宫发布消息说，总统普京提名梅德韦杰夫为俄政府新任总理。按照俄罗斯宪法规定，提名需经国家杜马审议并批准。外交部发言人耿爽7日对普京正式就任俄罗斯总统预致祝贺，并表示中方深信，在两国元首共同引领下，新时代的中俄全面战略协作伙伴关系内涵必将越来越丰富，两国各领域合作之路必将越走越宽广。（《普京宣誓就任俄罗斯新一届总统》由金羊网为您提供，转载请注明来源，未经书面授权许可，不得转载或镜像。版权联系电话：020-87133589，87133588）
culturax_text_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, the new President of the Russian Federation Vladimir Putin was sworn in at the Kremlin on the 7th and began his fourth presidential term. At noon that day, Putin read the presidential oath in front of the Russian Constitution. Subsequently, President Zolkin of the Russian Constitutional Court awarded Putin the badge symbolizing presidential power, announcing that Putin officially took office as President of Russia. After the inauguration ceremony, witnessed by Russian Defense Minister Sergei Shoigu, Putin took over the "nuclear suitcase" symbolizing Russia's strategic nuclear power. The Russian Constitution stipulates that the president is the head of state and supreme commander of the armed forces of Russia. On the same day, the Russian Kremlin announced that President Putin nominated Medvedev as the new prime minister of the Russian government. According to the Russian Constitution, nominations must be reviewed and approved by the State Duma. Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Geng Shuang extended advance congratulations to Vladimir Putin on his formal inauguration as Russian President on the 7th, and expressed that China firmly believes that under the joint leadership of the two heads of state, the connotation of the China-Russia comprehensive strategic partnership of coordination in the new era will become increasingly rich, and the path of cooperation between the two countries in all fields will become wider and wider. ("Putin is sworn in as the new president of Russia" is provided by Jinyang.com. Please indicate the source when reprinting. No reproduction or mirroring is allowed without written authorization. Copyright contact number: 020-87133589, 87133588)

culturax_text: 新华社北京10月12日电（记者孙辰茜）外交部发言人耿爽12日就中国渔船撞沉韩国海警快艇事件作出回应，称韩方有关说法站不住脚，并要求韩方冷静、理性处理有关问题。当日例行记者会上，有记者问：据韩国媒体报道，昨天，韩国外交部部长助理召见中国驻韩国大使，就10月7日在韩国西部海域发生的中国渔船撞沉韩国海警快艇事件表示抗议。中方对此有何回应？耿爽表示，经过核实，韩方的有关说法站不住脚。根据韩方提供的地理坐标，所谓的撞沉事件事发地点为北纬37度23分06秒，东经123度58分56秒，经过核实，该地点位于中韩渔业协定规定的维持现有渔业活动水域。根据协定的规定，韩国的海警在该海域开展执法活动没有法理依据，中方已经通过外交途径向韩方有关部门就此事提出了严正的交涉，要求韩方冷静、理性地处理有关问题。耿爽说，中方认为，韩方一味地加大处罚力度，并宣称不惜在执法过程中动用武力，这无法从根本上解决问题，反而容易激化矛盾，引发纠纷。中方再次要求韩方加强对执法人员的管束，在执法过程中保持克制，规范执法行为，不得滥用执法权，更不得采取可能伤及中方人员安全的过激行为和过激手段，要切实保障中方人员的安全和合法权益。耿爽表示，中韩渔业合作是双边关系的重要组成部分，良好的渔业合作秩序符合两国人民的利益。随着中韩渔业合作不断深入，发生一些纠纷和问题在所难免，关键是双方要按照中韩渔业协定以及双方达成的有关共识办事，加强沟通协调，保持冷静和理性，以长远和发展的眼光，客观看待、妥善处理有关渔业问题。
culturax_text_en: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, October 12 (Reporter Sun Chenqian) Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Geng Shuang responded to the incident of a Chinese fishing boat ramming and sinking a South Korean Coast Guard speedboat on the 12th, saying that South Korea’s relevant claims are untenable and asked South Korea to deal with relevant issues calmly and rationally. At the regular press conference that day, a reporter asked: According to Korean media reports, yesterday, the Assistant Minister of Foreign Affairs of South Korea summoned the Chinese Ambassador to South Korea to protest against the incident in which a Chinese fishing boat rammed and sank a South Korean Coast Guard speedboat in the western waters of South Korea on October 7. What is China’s response to this? Geng Shuang said that after verification, the relevant claims of the South Korean side are untenable. According to the geographical coordinates provided by South Korea, the so-called collision and sinking incident occurred at 37 degrees 23 minutes 06 seconds north latitude and 123 degrees 58 minutes 56 seconds east longitude. After verification, the location was located in the waters stipulated in the China-South Korea fishery agreement to maintain existing fishery activities. According to the provisions of the agreement, there is no legal basis for South Korea's Coast Guard to carry out law enforcement activities in this sea area. China has made stern representations to the relevant South Korean departments on this matter through diplomatic channels and requires South Korea to handle relevant issues calmly and rationally. Geng Shuang said that China believes that South Korea blindly increases penalties and declares that it will not hesitate to use force in law enforcement. This cannot fundamentally solve the problem, but will easily intensify conflicts and cause disputes. China once again requires the South Korean side to strengthen the control of law enforcement personnel, exercise restraint in the process of law enforcement, standardize law enforcement behavior, not abuse law enforcement power, let alone adopt excessive behavior and excessive means that may harm the safety of Chinese personnel, and effectively protect the safety and legitimate rights and interests of Chinese personnel. Geng Shuang said that fishery cooperation between China and South Korea is an important part of bilateral relations, and a good order of fishery cooperation is in the interests of the two peoples. As China-ROK fishery cooperation continues to deepen, some disputes and problems are inevitable. The key is that both sides should act in accordance with the China-ROK Fishery Agreement and the relevant consensus reached by both parties, strengthen communication and coordination, remain calm and rational, and objectively view and properly handle relevant fishery issues from a long-term and development perspective.

culturax_text: 乌克兰临时政府19日说，正在制订从克里米亚撤军的方案并且考虑是否退出独立国家联合体。美国威胁对俄采取进一步制裁，但总统贝拉克·奥巴马重申，不会使用武力。俄方则警告，将针锋相对并且在国际事务中不给予合作。乌海军司令已获释乌克兰国家安全和国防委员会秘书安德烈·帕鲁比19日说，乌方正在制订一套方案，以便能“迅速、有效地”从克里米亚撤出官兵及军属。帕鲁比还说，乌克兰将在乌俄边界部署更多部队并对俄罗斯公民实行签证制度，以“强化边境安全”。当天早些时候，亲俄民兵在克里米亚塞瓦斯托波尔港控制乌克兰海军司令部，迫使乌军士兵离开，扣押新任海军司令谢尔盖·盖杜克。乌克兰方面随即发出“最后通牒”，限令3小时内放人。期限过后，俄罗斯国防部长谢尔盖·绍伊古命令亲俄武装释放盖杜克。代行乌克兰总统职权的议长亚历山大·图尔奇诺夫20日在网站发表声明，说盖杜克和“全部其他平民人质”已经获释。路透社报道，亲俄武装19日还接管了位于克里米亚首府辛菲罗波尔附近的另一处乌海军设施，要求驻军离开。乌克兰外交部发言人19日说，乌克兰不再担任独联体2014年轮值主席，“保留重新审视（乌克兰）独联体成员资格的权利”。独联体由苏联前加盟共和国组建，现有11个成员国。上一个退出独联体的国家是2008年与俄罗斯发生武装冲突的格鲁吉亚。俄罗斯外交部副部长谢尔盖·涅边贾告诉俄新社记者，俄方对乌方决定感到遗憾，不过乌方有权作出选择。普京下令政府部门准备建造一座公路和铁路两用桥，横跨刻赤海峡，连接克里米亚和俄南部克拉斯诺达尔地区，从而不必经过乌克兰东部地区直接进入克里米亚。俄新社援引俄交通部长马克西姆·索科洛夫的话报道，部分预备项目今年可以就绪，同时俄方正在考虑建造刻赤海峡海底隧道的可行性。乌将与美英联合演习乌克兰、美国及其欧洲盟友不承认克里米亚脱乌入俄。乌国家安全和国防委员会秘书帕鲁比19日宣布，乌克兰将与美国和英国举行联合演习。美国五角大楼也宣布，美方将于今年夏季在乌克兰参加多国例行年度军演。这类演习已经举行多年，除美国，北大西洋公约组织其他成员国也参演。去年的演习持续两周，17个国家参演。美方没有说明今年演习具体时间以及预定参演美军人数。北约最近在俄罗斯邻国“舞枪弄棒”，但是北约和美国已经表示，无意因乌克兰危机与俄罗斯爆发武装冲突。美国总统奥巴马19日接受一家美国电视台采访时重申这一立场。奥巴马说，“武力不能解决问题”，“没有必要触发一场与俄罗斯的真正战争”，而且“乌克兰也认为，与俄罗斯发生军事对抗不合适，对乌克兰无益”。他说，美方将“动用一切外交资源”，继续对俄罗斯施压。美国和欧洲联盟已经对一些俄罗斯官员实行制裁措施，包括冻结资产和签证限制。美国国务院发言人珍·普萨基19日警告：“现在的问题不是我们是否会发起更多制裁，而是何时制裁。”按照普萨基的说法，制裁已经“重创”俄罗斯经济，让对方“实实在在感到疼痛”。美俄安理会唇枪舌剑只是，俄方对制裁表现得不为所惧。俄罗斯国际文传电讯社19日援引俄副外长谢尔盖·里亚布科夫的话报道：“我们正在研究广泛对应措施，可能包括类似手段，即把一些美方官员纳入（制裁）名单。”另外，俄方也可能采取“非对称措施”。他暗示，俄罗斯可能以伊朗核问题谈判作为对抗西方制裁的手段。“如果迫不得已，我们将采取对应措施，因为……克里米亚与俄罗斯重新统一与伊朗问题不可同日而语”。美国和俄罗斯常驻联合国代表19日在安全理事会会议上唇枪舌剑。美国代表萨曼莎·鲍尔说：“小偷可以偷走财物，但这并不意味着赋予小偷财物所有权”。俄罗斯代表维塔利·丘尔金回应道，这类言论是“小报水平”。“决不能接受如此侮辱我们的国家。如果美国代表团期望我们在安理会就其他事项给予合作，必须完全明白这一点。”惠晓霜新华社供本报特稿■相关俄杜马批准克入俄条约乌总理说暂不对俄实行签证制度俄罗斯国家杜马（议会下院）20日投票批准了克里米亚入俄条约，并审议通过了规定其地位及边界等细节的宪法草案。乌克兰总理亚采纽克当天说，不应该急于对俄罗斯实行签证制度。俄国家杜马20日举行全体会议，高票批准了克里米亚入俄条约，这份条约由俄总统普京和克里米亚议长、总理及塞瓦斯托波尔市长于18日签署。条约规定，克里米亚和塞瓦斯托波尔自18日起，各以联邦主体身份加入俄罗斯。当天的杜马会议还审议并最终通过了规定克里米亚和塞瓦斯托波尔地位及边界等细节的宪法草案，该文件21日将再经俄联邦委员会（议会上院）审议，并需总统普京签署后正式生效。乌克兰政府新闻局20日发布的消息说，总理亚采纽克表示，不应该急于对俄罗斯实行签证制度。他说，俄罗斯自己就曾多次提出在独联体国家间实行签证制度的问题，因此从对俄罗斯施加影响的角度来看，由乌克兰带这个头未必有效。此外，大量乌克兰公民，特别是东部和南部地区的公民，希望保留免签制度，因为他们要去俄罗斯打工和走亲访友。新华
culturax_text_en: Ukraine's interim government said on the 19th that it was formulating a plan to withdraw its troops from Crimea and considering whether to withdraw from the Commonwealth of Independent States. The United States threatened further sanctions against Russia, but President Barack Obama reiterated that force would not be used. Russia warned that it would be tit-for-tat and not cooperate in international affairs. The commander of the Ukrainian navy has been released. Andrei Parubi, secretary of the National Security and Defense Council of Ukraine, said on the 19th that Ukraine is formulating a plan to "quickly and effectively" withdraw its officers, soldiers and military dependents from Crimea. Parubi also said that Ukraine will deploy more troops on the Ukrainian-Russian border and implement a visa system for Russian citizens to "strengthen border security." Earlier in the day, pro-Russian militiamen took control of the Ukrainian naval headquarters in the Crimean port of Sevastopol, forcing Ukrainian soldiers to leave and detaining the new naval commander Sergei Gaiduk. Ukraine immediately issued an "ultimatum" and ordered his release within three hours. After the deadline, Russian Defense Minister Sergei Shoigu ordered pro-Russian forces to release Gaiduk. Speaker of the House of Representatives Alexander Turchinov, who acts as the president of Ukraine, issued a statement on the website on the 20th, saying that Gaiduk and "all other civilian hostages" had been released. Reuters reported that pro-Russian armed forces also took over another Ukrainian naval facility near Simferopol, the capital of Crimea, on the 19th and asked the garrison to leave. A spokesman for the Ukrainian Ministry of Foreign Affairs said on the 19th that Ukraine will no longer serve as the rotating chairman of the CIS in 2014 and "reserves the right to review (Ukraine's) membership of the CIS." The Commonwealth of Independent States was formed from the former Soviet republics and currently has 11 member states. The last country to withdraw from the CIS was Georgia, which had an armed conflict with Russia in 2008. Russian Deputy Foreign Minister Sergey Nebenzia told RIA Novosti reporters that Russia regrets Uzbekistan’s decision, but Uzbekistan has the right to make a choice. Putin ordered the government to build a road and railway bridge across the Kerch Strait to connect Crimea with the Krasnodar region in southern Russia, so that Crimea can be entered directly without passing through eastern Ukraine. RIA Novosti quoted Russian Transport Minister Maxim Sokolov as saying that some preparatory projects could be ready this year, and Russia is considering the feasibility of building an undersea tunnel in the Kerch Strait. Ukraine will conduct joint exercises with the United States and Britain. Ukraine, the United States and its European allies do not recognize Crimea's withdrawal from Ukraine and its entry into Russia. Parubi, Secretary of the National Security and Defense Council of Ukraine, announced on the 19th that Ukraine will hold joint exercises with the United States and the United Kingdom. The U.S. Pentagon also announced that the United States will participate in multinational annual military exercises in Ukraine this summer. This type of exercise has been held for many years, and in addition to the United States, other members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization also participate. Last year's exercise lasted two weeks and involved 17 countries. The United States did not specify the specific time of this year's exercise or the number of U.S. troops scheduled to participate. NATO has recently been "dancing with guns and sticks" in Russia's neighboring countries, but NATO and the United States have stated that they have no intention of breaking out in an armed conflict with Russia due to the Ukraine crisis. US President Obama reiterated this position in an interview with an American TV station on the 19th. Obama said that "force cannot solve the problem", "there is no need to trigger a real war with Russia", and "Ukraine also believes that a military confrontation with Russia is inappropriate and unhelpful to Ukraine." He said that the United States will "use all diplomatic resources" to continue to put pressure on Russia. The United States and the European Union have imposed sanctions on some Russian officials, including asset freezes and visa restrictions. U.S. State Department spokesperson Jen Psaki warned on the 19th: "The question now is not whether we will launch more sanctions, but when." According to Psaki, the sanctions have "severely damaged" the Russian economy and caused the other side to "really feel pain." The US-Russian Security Council has been at loggerheads with each other, but Russia has shown no fear of sanctions. Russia's Interfax news agency quoted Russian Deputy Foreign Minister Sergey Ryabkov as saying on the 19th: "We are studying a wide range of countermeasures, which may include similar means, that is, including some US officials on the (sanctions) list." In addition, Russia may also adopt "asymmetric measures." He hinted that Russia may use negotiations on the Iranian nuclear issue as a means to counter Western sanctions. "If we have to, we will take corresponding measures because... the reunification of Crimea and Russia is not the same as the Iran issue." The permanent representatives of the United States and Russia to the United Nations exchanged words at a Security Council meeting on the 19th. "A thief can steal property, but that does not give the thief ownership of the property," said U.S. Representative Samantha Power. Russian representative Vitaly Churkin responded that such comments were "tabloid level". "We must never accept such an insult.

culturax_text: 沙特阿拉伯官员25日晚证实，沙特等多国出动空军，对也门境内的胡塞武装发动空袭，以支援受困的也门总统阿卜杜拉布·曼苏尔·哈迪。沙特驻美国大使阿德尔·朱拜尔当天在美国首都华盛顿说，参与军事行动的包括海湾阿拉伯国家合作委员会成员国，也有海合会以外的国家参与。与此同时，沙特、卡塔尔、科威特、巴林和阿拉伯联合酋长国在沙特首都利雅得发表一份联合声明，称海合会已收到也门总统哈迪的支援请求。空袭军事目标应也门政府请求，沙特阿拉伯等国于当地时间26日凌晨对也门首都萨那等地胡塞武装控制的目标发动空袭。也门外长里亚德·亚辛25日在埃及沙姆沙伊赫出席阿盟首脑会议预备会期间呼吁阿拉伯国家对也门实施紧急军事干预。数小时后，沙特率先对也门境内胡塞武装发动打击。“我们这个联盟有超过10个国家将参与这些军事行动，”朱拜尔说。沙特阿拉伯等国26日在空袭也门胡塞武装组织占领的萨那北部一处空军基地时，误袭了基地以外的居民区，造成至少25人死亡、50余人受伤。胡塞武装26日发表声明，证实军事基地遭到沙特战机空袭，称胡塞武装发射防空导弹予以回击。胡塞武装组织政治局成员穆罕默德·布海提对记者说：“沙特的入侵是向也门人宣战，我们会进行反击。”他警告说，这可能将整个地区拖入全面战争。酝酿地面攻势沙特没有透露参与联盟军事行动的具体国家和参与规模，但阿拉伯媒体报道，科威特、阿联酋、卡塔尔、巴林、约旦、摩洛哥、埃及和苏丹均参与军事行动。阿拉伯电视台报道，埃及、约旦、苏丹和巴基斯坦已经准备好随时参与在也门境内的地面军事行动，而沙特方面准备为可能的军事行动提供100架战机和15万名士兵。部分相关国家没有证实媒体报道。埃及外交部26日发表声明，宣布参与沙特领导的也门军事行动，帮助也门总统抵御胡塞武装攻势。“埃及正与沙特和其他海湾国家协商，准备作为联盟行动的一部分，在必要时出动空军、海军乃至陆军，”声明说。美国后勤支持美国官员25日证实，美方正与沙特等海湾国家密切协作，以提供情报和后勤支持的方式帮助联盟军事力量打击胡塞武装。美国国家安全委员会女发言人米汉说，总统贝拉克·奥巴马已授权美国军方为沙特领导的军事行动提供相关支持，但美军没有直接参与这次军事行动，而是“正在与沙特设立一个联合参谋中心”，协调相关军事援助事宜。美国与也门政府先前在反恐问题上合作密切，却因也门乱局而受到冲击。新华社供本报特稿胡塞武装逼近亚丁总统避至“安全屋”也门胡塞武装25日夺取南部一座主要空军基地，并继续向总统阿卜杜拉布·曼苏尔·哈迪行使职权的第二大城市亚丁挺进。哈迪的一名主要助手否认哈迪已前往国外，称总统仍在亚丁，不过从临时总统府撤离，前往一处“安全地点”。哈迪前一天致信联合国安全理事会，呼吁联合国立即提供支援，避免也门冲突造成更多混乱和更大破坏。逼近亚丁胡塞武装控制的“马西拉”电视新闻频道25日早些时候报道，经过数小时交战，胡塞武装及其支持者当天占领也门最大的阿纳德空军基地。这座基地是一处战略要地，位于亚丁以北大约50公里。美国先前在这里驻军，以通过无人驾驶飞机打击“基地”组织阿拉伯半岛分支。由于也门安全形势恶化，美军人员已于20日撤离。也门一名军方官员说，胡塞武装及其支持者占领阿纳德空军基地后继续南下，已逼近胡塔市外3公里。这座拉赫季省首府毗邻亚丁。路透社报道，胡塞武装仅距亚丁不到40公里。当局抵抗也门军方多名官员说，效忠哈迪的部族武装已分头阻拦胡塞武装前进。他们说，这些部族武装25日在5处地点与胡塞武装交战。多名居民说，在胡塔市郊看见双方交战人员的多具遗体倒在街边。胡塞武装发言人阿卜杜勒·萨拉姆当天说，也门国防部长穆罕默德·苏拜希及其首席助手在拉赫季市与胡塞武装交战时被捕，将被转移至胡塞武装控制的首都萨那。一些目击者说，一些支持哈迪的军事人员和部族武装人员集体出动，进入亚丁市。总统“移驾”胡塞武装去年9月夺取了萨那的控制权并试图向南推进。今年1月，胡塞武装与也门总统卫队发生冲突并占领总统府，之后软禁总统哈迪和总理哈立德·马赫福兹·巴哈。2月21日，哈迪设法离开了萨那，抵达亚丁并在那里行使总统职权。总统安保部门一名消息人士先前说，哈迪已“乘坐一架直升机从（临时）总统府出发，飞往国外一处未知地点”。一些目击者说，他们看见总统25日在一个政府车队护卫下离开位于亚丁一处山顶的临时总统府。呼吁干涉鉴于也门形势逐步恶化，联合国也门问题特使贾迈勒·贝努马尔22日警告，也门正走向内战。哈迪24日致信联合国安理会，呼吁联合国作出决定，要求一些国家立即向也门提供支援，“通过一切手段和措施保护也门，阻止胡塞武装进攻和占领”一些战略城市，包括亚丁。他担忧，作为“基地”分支，阿拉伯半岛基地组织将“利用目前的不稳定形势，引发进一步混乱”。法新社报道，安理会没有对哈迪的呼吁作出回应，仅在22日应哈迪要求举行一场紧急会议，并在会上发表声明，支持哈迪。一些安理会成员国外交官说，眼下没有举行其他会议的计划。哈迪说，他已经要求海湾阿拉伯国家合作委员会成员国和其他阿拉伯国家联盟成员国立即提供支援，包括军事干涉，以帮助抗击胡塞武装。据新华社电新闻分析也门：美国反恐梦魇？短短几个月前，美国总统贝拉克·奥巴马还将也门当作美国全球反恐策略的成功案例之一来宣扬。随着也门总统公开求援、沙特阿拉伯等国越境空袭胡塞武装目标，外国势力正式干预也门乱局。一些政治分析师认为，作为美国在中东重要盟友的沙特带头发动空袭，一定程度上反映出美国及沙特等海湾国家对也门局势“失控”的担忧，也宣告美国全球反恐的这一重要前线遭重创。美国官员承认，眼下的乱局反而给了“基地”组织更多喘息空间，美国打击“基地”组织阿拉伯半岛分支的努力遭遇重大挫折。一些政治分析师认为，除影响美国全球反恐策略外，也门乱局可能对已经饱受教派纷争冲击的中东地区局势带来变数。因作为原油出口大国的沙特已经出手干预也门局势，也门冲突对油价的影响也成为原油市场关注点之一。三菱日联摩根士丹利证券公司高级投资分析师藤东典广（音译）认为，沙特单方面军事干预确实“不寻常”，但对原油期货价格的影响有限。受沙特越境空
culturax_text_en: Saudi Arabian officials confirmed on the evening of the 25th that Saudi Arabia and many other countries dispatched their air forces to launch air strikes against the Houthi armed forces in Yemen to support the beleaguered Yemeni President Abd-Rabbu Mansour Hadi. Saudi Ambassador to the United States Adel al-Jubeir said in the U.S. capital Washington that day that those participating in the military operation include members of the Gulf Cooperation Council and countries outside the GCC. At the same time, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates issued a joint statement in the Saudi capital Riyadh, saying that the GCC had received a request for support from Yemeni President Hadi. Air strikes on military targets At the request of the Yemeni government, Saudi Arabia and other countries launched air strikes on targets controlled by the Houthi armed forces in Sanaa, the capital of Yemen, and other places in the early morning of the 26th local time. On the 25th, Yemeni Foreign Minister Riyad Yassin called on Arab countries to implement emergency military intervention in Yemen while attending the preparatory meeting of the Arab League summit in Sharm el-Sheikh, Egypt. Hours later, Saudi Arabia took the lead in launching an attack on the Houthi armed forces in Yemen. "More than 10 countries in our alliance will participate in these military operations," Al-Jubeir said. On the 26th, when Saudi Arabia and other countries carried out an air strike on an air base in northern Sanaa occupied by the Houthi armed group in Yemen, they mistakenly attacked residential areas outside the base, killing at least 25 people and injuring more than 50 people. The Houthi armed forces issued a statement on the 26th, confirming that the military base was attacked by Saudi fighter jets, saying that the Houthi armed forces launched anti-aircraft missiles in response. "The Saudi invasion is a declaration of war on the Yemenis and we will fight back," Mohammed al-Buhati, a member of the Houthi armed group's political bureau, told reporters, warning that it could drag the entire region into a full-scale war. Preparing for a ground offensive, Saudi Arabia did not disclose the specific countries participating in the coalition's military operations and the scale of their participation, but Arab media reported that Kuwait, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Jordan, Morocco, Egypt and Sudan were all involved in the military operations. Al Arabiya TV reported that Egypt, Jordan, Sudan and Pakistan are ready to participate in ground military operations in Yemen at any time, while Saudi Arabia is ready to provide 100 fighter jets and 150,000 soldiers for possible military operations. Some relevant countries did not confirm media reports. Egypt's Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement on the 26th, announcing its participation in the Saudi-led military operation in Yemen to help the President of Yemen resist the Houthi armed offensive. "Egypt is consulting with Saudi Arabia and other Gulf countries and is preparing to use its air force, navy and even army if necessary as part of coalition operations," the statement said. U.S. Logistical Support U.S. officials confirmed on the 25th that the United States is working closely with Saudi Arabia and other Gulf countries to help the coalition military forces fight the Houthi armed forces by providing intelligence and logistical support. U.S. National Security Council spokeswoman Meehan said that President Barack Obama has authorized the U.S. military to provide relevant support for the Saudi-led military operation, but the U.S. military is not directly involved in this military operation. Instead, it is "setting up a joint staff center with Saudi Arabia" to coordinate related military assistance matters. The United States and the Yemeni government had previously cooperated closely on counter-terrorism issues, but they were impacted by the chaos in Yemen. Special article provided by Xinhua News Agency: Houthi armed forces approach Aden and the president takes refuge in a "safe house". On the 25th, Yemen's Houthi armed forces seized a major air base in the south and continued to advance towards Aden, the second largest city where President Abd Rabbu Mansour Hadi exercises power. A key aide to Hadi denied that Hadi had traveled abroad, saying that the president was still in Aden but had evacuated the interim presidential palace to a "safe location." Hadi sent a letter to the United Nations Security Council the day before, calling on the United Nations to provide immediate support to prevent the conflict in Yemen from causing more chaos and greater destruction. The "Masira" TV news channel, which is approaching the control of the Houthi armed forces in Aden, reported early on the 25th that after several hours of fighting, the Houthi armed forces and their supporters occupied Yemen's largest Anad Air Force Base that day. The base is a strategically located location approximately 50 kilometers north of Aden. The United States previously stationed troops here to use drones to attack the al-Qaeda branch in the Arabian Peninsula. Due to the deterioration of the security situation in Yemen, US military personnel evacuated on the 20th. A Yemeni military official said that after occupying Anad Air Base, the Houthi armed forces and their supporters continued to move south and were approaching 3 kilometers outside the city of Huta. The capital of Lahj province borders Aden. Reuters reported that the Houthi armed forces are less than 40 kilometers away from Aden. Several officials from the Yemeni military said that tribal forces loyal to Hadi have split up to block the advance of the Houthis. They said that these tribal armed forces fought with the Houthi armed forces at five locations on the 25th. Many residents said they saw multiple bodies of combatants from both sides lying on the street on the outskirts of Huta.
